reviews.title: please do yourself a favor and BUY IT
reviews.text: i’ve finally come to give the h20 altec lansing speaker the review it needs, i’ve used my speaker for more than 4 years now: in the shower, on a florida trip in the sand and by the water, pool gatherings, sitting in the sun AND IT STILL WORKS AMAZING!!! battery is still so good can hold power for hours and hours, easily connects, and the sound is still so perfect and loud for how tiny it is. the product i will never regret buying, soo worth your money. looking forward to getting my new bigger speaker soon!

reviews.author: rualdova

reviews.title: Good little speaker with relatively minor quibbles
reviews.text:
The Altec-Lansing Jacket H20 4 is a decent Bluetooth speaker. Generally enjoyable and plenty loud. I don't think you would be disappointed in purchasing it.

It produces decent sound, though it's just a tad heavy on the bass compared to mid- and high-levels. It's not bad, just not 100% to my liking. The sound produced is much better than the size would indicate in other speakers.

I have a two-fold complaint: 1) the instructions included are not sufficient for aging eyes. I'm not sure when my vision was perfect I could have read this. 2) When I got this, the speaker turned on, meaning it had some charge. It would not connect to my phone. Charged it overnight, and then I could connect to my phone. Tried to connect to a tablet. It would not connect until I charged it again. A third device also had issues, though that involved rebooting the Chromebook. And the speaker. Multiple times. It's sad I have to turn off Bluetooth on all the devices I don't want. Feels like Altec Lansing needs to revisit device handling and fix the initial connection issue.

reviews.title: Worth what I spent!
reviews.text:
Works well enough for the sale price I bought it at.
Takes water and a beating like a champ. 
(Wife dropped it in the tub multiple times and my daughter likes to throw stuff for 0 reason at all). 

Sound just isn't full enough out of the box for the price with other budget brands on the market that almost hit entry level audiophile sound for two thirds of the sale price. 

No regrets though. 
Buy it if you want a decent name connected to a speaker that will survive a hand grenade lol

reviews.title: Very durable, good quality speaker. But...
reviews.text:
The speaker is very durable, (handling rain and bumby trails well as a beach bike accessory) and sound is pretty good as well.

The only problem I have, that I have not been able to resolve thus far, is that if it's linked to my phone or computer for videos. The unit simply shuts off on its own mid show.

If I find a way to resolve this issue I'll update my review accordingly.
